entries.value: Normally, this material is not found in nature, but for some abnormal and unknown reason, it exists in the form of ore.
A classic arrow, usable with a bow.
Once known as the hardest material in the world, diamond has lost its reputation for rarity and extreme effectiveness.
Silver is a precious metal, but its quality leaves much to be desired for equipment improvement.
SquareBlock has a never-before-seen structure, with extreme rarity, making it the most resistant, lightweight, and hard material simultaneously.
This small piece of slime is very sticky and... Disgusting.
This very stable material is both beautiful and useful for crafting certain ancient technologies.
Dried grass for animals. (Or for you, if you're feeling a bit peckish.)
This slime heart appears to be the generator that produces the sticky layer on these small creatures.
Coal is widely used for cooking food or warming up during freezing periods.
This little cubic ant seems to be devoid of consciousness and camaraderie. It wanders alone.
This wing is very flexible, it’s an interesting material for… It’s an interesting material.
A snake’s fang. Careful, it’s poisonous !!! … Just kidding. A single fang isn’t dangerous, of course.
Very tasty and rich in vitamins.
Small healing potion. Nothing extraordinary. Restores 3 hearts.
This weapon is for tests. If u have this, wtf
A sword passed through many hands, used until its last breath. As dangerous as a toothpick.
A strike to send any threat flying. Just for pushing—they won’t feel much pain.
This helmet is for tests. If u have this, wtf
More goo than solid, but it works.
This chestplate is for tests. If u have this, wtf
Just think — a poor slime was killed, and now its corpse is your outfit. Bounces a lot. Way too much.
Those leggings are for tests. If u have this, wtf
Slime leggings, perfect for high jumps. Not that you could jump much before...
Those boots are for tests. If u have those, wtf
Makes a ‘splorch’ with every step. Stealth guaranteed.
Clearly fought a war... against time. Mostly protects you from compliments.
There are stains—maybe blood, maybe sauce. Either way, it sticks.
Partial protection: covers one knee out of two. Style bonus: none.
When your toes see the world before you do, it's time for an upgrade.
A sword made of bone. Not very sharp, but it sure hurts when it hits the nose.
Wearing a skeleton’s skull on your own. How charming !
This chestplate offers surgical-level protection. Ribs protect your ribs, the sternum shields your sternum… you get the idea...
If someone hits the armor's shin, it won’t hurt like hell this time... ...Unlike your fragile body.
Perfect for protecting your pinky toe from table legs or worse.
This spear has slain many slimes. It doesn't deal much damage, but allows for interesting critical hits.
This weapon allows you to strike vital points with effortless ease. Huge critical damage to save you from a situation by a miracle.
This aberration was tough... But now, if you have a full life, you have a high chance to shoot lasers when attacking. Handy !
Keeps your head safe and your hairstyle almost intact.
Light protection, but hey, at least it matches your shoes.
Strong enough for a fight, flexible enough for a dance.
Run fast, look stylish—what more do you want ?
Heavy protection. Don’t expect to hear much with this on.
Like a steel hug, if hugs crushed your ribs a little.
Warning: may squeak when you walk dramatically.
Clank clank clank, stealth is overrated anyway.
Looks like a salad, feels like a garden party on your head.
Made of leaves, eco-friendly, but don’t sit near a campfire.
Soft, green, and surprisingly good for your daily step count.
A dagger whose blade is the fang of a poor serpent. It doesn’t deal much damage, but it can poison your enemies.
She didn’t know how to use it, so she hid it in her bandages. Not very practical—and quite itchy.
A vile sword that can freeze your enemies. Be careful not to break the cold chain !
Originally, it wasn’t meant to be a weapon. However, the person who used it smashed their enemies so hard that fragments of SquareCoins got embedded in it.
A sword crafted from the skin and magic of the Shyrons. Grants immeasurable attack power.
